task_name: Conflicting Information Handling between Local Data and Web
title: Background of the Dispute
sub_context: During the Paris Olympics, Company A in China sold a batch of sports equipment to domestic Company B for use in Company B’s export business. The parties agreed that Company B should pay for the goods within 30 days after delivery. However, after receiving the goods, Company B never made payment.
question_or_objective: Understand the context of the dispute between Company A and Company B.

task_name: Conflicting Information Handling between Local Data and Web
title: Acknowledgment of Debt
sub_context: In August of the same year, Company B confirmed by email that it still owed RMB 500,000 in payment and promised to pay as soon as possible.
question_or_objective: Evaluate the acknowledgment of debt by Company B.

task_name: Conflicting Information Handling between Local Data and Web
title: Collection Efforts
sub_context: After that, the parties engaged in multiple rounds of collection and negotiation, but the debt remained unpaid.
question_or_objective: Assess the collection efforts made by Company A.

task_name: Conflicting Information Handling between Local Data and Web
title: Legal Preparation
sub_context: In September of the same year, I am a lawyer preparing to file a lawsuit on behalf of Company A to recover the payment.
question_or_objective: Understand the legal preparation stage for Company A's lawsuit.

task_name: Conflicting Information Handling between Local Data and Web
title: Statute of Limitations Inquiry
sub_context: My question is: what is the statute of limitations for this claim?
question_or_objective: Evaluate the inquiry regarding the statute of limitations for the claim.

title: Task Metadata
sub_context: Task ID: 04_Search_Retrieval_task_4_efficient_search. Category: 04_Search_Retrieval. Task Name: Search Efficiency Test.
question_or_objective: Understand the task's identification and categorization.

title: Search Requirements
sub_context: The task requires a maximum of 4 searches, explicit queries for each search, and a complete evidence chain. If confirmation is not possible, the task must state 'Unable to confirm.'
question_or_objective: Evaluate the constraints and requirements for conducting the search.

title: Output Format
sub_context: The output format specifies how to present the results, including total searches, queries, findings, final answers, evidence chain, and reasoning.
question_or_objective: Assess the required structure for the output of the task.

title: Fuzzy Intent Search Request
sub_context: Help me find that paper from 2025 which was among the earlier works to transfer a DeepSeek-R1-like approach to visual perception tasks. I only remember that the first author’s last name was Liu, and their GitHub repository should have more than 2k stars.
question_or_objective: Evaluate the ability to retrieve a specific academic paper based on fuzzy search criteria.
